allow: Bash(venv/bin/python padsplit_scraper/scraper.py 2>&1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Messages:', len\(d['messages']\)\); print\('Task buckets:', list\(d['tasks'].keys\(\)\)\); print\('Total tickets:', sum\(len\(v\) for v in d['tasks'].values\(\)\)\)")
